title: Peruvian Beef Heart Skewers with Italian Twist
description: A fusion of Peruvian and Italian flavors, this dish features tender beef heart skewers marinated in a mix of soy sauce, garlic, and herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, garlic, olive oil, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef heart cubes to the marinade and mix to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated beef heart cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, with lemon wedges on the side if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of Italian-style polenta or roasted vegetables.
